Hey, what's going on everyone? We received a lot of questions about this despite the video that I made regarding protein and in an effort to not have you guys You know go in search and sell multiple brands, which I definitely don't recommend This is one first why we didn't do a protein and then second what we are doing about it for you guys since we had so many requests So the reason I don't like selling protein is because protein a in my mind is food and is not a results-based product So it is much more difficult in my opinion to sell protein than it is to sell Intra or pre-workout because those have specific results that they are Yielding whereas protein is is food. You know what I mean? It's chicken breast. It's shrimp, right? That's why there are you know nutrition facts on the side of protein and there are supplement facts on the side of supplements So I see it as food not Supplements and because it is food food is highly commoditized and And so we had a choice of what direction like what was the objective we really trying to achieve with a Protein product and so after going back and forth with Dr. Pashy for a long period of time This is probably the one that we have labored over the most in terms of actual time spent talking about it and talking about the objectives and the results and all that kind of stuff Well, we basically came to the conclusion of is that we wanted to create a product that was delicious and was had protein in it But was not a pure protein product and so it's much more like truly food than just a pure protein because if you really just want to get a pure protein then Just go buy a big bag of you know way isolate or whatever go buy iso pure You know whatever you know what I mean? There's there's a million and that's and that's why they're all at this exact same price because there's literally just like it's a It's a race to the bottom and I refuse to play in a commoditized game and as you shouldn't either so The way to combat that is to create something that is not a commodity and create something that is different right create something that is Better that stands on its own category right and so for that reason We actually will probably never make a protein but instead what we decided to go with was a meal replacement and This is actually going to feed directly into the selling system but basically when you have a meal replacement then you can sell the supplements and then pause and then after you've wrapped up that You go into food discussions and then the food discussions lead to the sale of a meal replacement So it's like what's the hardest meal that you you know, what's the most struggle with the most I start with breakfast awesome Do you want to sell be out with that? Yeah, that'd be great awesome here. Let's save you some money. This is gonna be cheaper than What you pay for for breakfast right now or for lunch right now, right? And so we actually have a meal replacement product that is coming out by the summit Which is January 22nd 2019 so if you're watching this after that point then this is already live But basically the macros for that are gonna be about 120 130 calories with 16 grams of protein 3 grams of fat and 7 grams of carbs and the whole point here is that with general population Taste is everything taste is what actually keeps them buying it again. No matter what it's taste like we can sell Whatever we want and we can get something the first time But what the once they taste a true pure protein product that has nothing in it But just protein they will quickly not want to keep drinking it Especially like I said Jen pop is trying to lose weight And so we want the different direction of like how can we make this thing taste amazing so that they continue to take it So they get excited to take it and like That's the point and so this also provides better margins, it's decommodatized And the difference between you know four grams or five grams of protein in a single Serving unit is not going to make the difference on some was larger scale But we'll make an immense difference in the quality the taste of the product and the longevity of their continuity so that being said We are doing a mirror placement and it will be homemade vanilla ice cream So get excited for that and that is what? That is what is coming out. We've gone through so many flavoring houses to come up with the flavoring profile for this I can't even tell you how much time we spent on the actual flavor promote because that is the main thing It has to be amazing. It has to be delicious so without further ado that is that and it will have a more competitive Commission then you'd be able to make on a protein and it's decommodatized and people will stay on it much much longer
